headline: Anthropic releases containment framework for Claude deployments across products
body: Anthropic published detailed engineering documentation on how it contains Claude across different product environments, addressing a critical concern for healthcare organizations evaluating large language model deployment. For healthcare AI implementations, containment strategies directly impact security posture in clinical settings where patient data isolation and controlled model behavior are non-negotiable. The framework becomes particularly relevant as healthcare systems consider Claude for clinical documentation, coding assistance, and decision support tools that must operate within strict regulatory boundaries. Healthcare IT leaders and consulting teams implementing AI workflows should review these containment mechanisms to understand how model behavior can be scoped to specific clinical use cases without exposing sensitive EHR data or enabling unintended outputs.
